notes.title: National War Memorial Establishment
notes.content: The National War Memorial was established in February 2019.

notes.title: Purpose of the National War Memorial
Location of the National War Memorial
Eternal Flame at the National War Memorial
Activities at the National War Memorial
notes.content: Visiting the website, reciting the poem with classmates and teacher.

notes.title: National War Memorial Importance
notes.content: To pay homage to our brave soldiers.

notes.title: Sacrifice of Brave Soldiers
notes.content: Their sacrifice is always remembered at the National War Memorial.

notes.title: Respect and Pride
notes.content: The National War Memorial stands with pride and respect for our brave soldiers.

facts.fact: The National War Memorial was established in February 2019.
It is a national monument built by the Government of India.
The National War Memorial honours our brave soldiers.
Amar Jawan Jyoti is the eternal flame at the National War Memorial.
https://www.mgov.in is the website to learn more about the National War Memorial.
Reciting the poem with classmates and teacher is one of the activities at the National War Memorial.
The National War Memorial is located in New Delhi.
The National War Memorial is a symbol of respect and pride for our brave soldiers.
The sacrifice of our brave soldiers is always remembered at the National War Memorial.
